name: Partnership Dissolution Agreement
description: A formal agreement to dissolve an existing general partnership, liquidate its assets, and settle its liabilities.
content:
PARTNERSHIP DISSOLUTION AND LIQUIDATION AGREEMENT

This Partnership Dissolution Agreement (the "Agreement") is made and entered into on {{formatDate agreement_date}}, by and among the undersigned Partners, for the purpose of mutually dissolving the general partnership formed on {{formatDate formation_date}}{{#if partnership_name}} and operating under the name "{{partnership_name}}"{{/if}}.

1. THE PARTNERS

The parties to this Agreement are:

{{partner_details}}

2. DISSOLUTION

The Partners hereby mutually agree to dissolve the Partnership effective as of {{formatDate agreement_date}}. As of this date, no Partner shall have the authority to bind the Partnership to any new obligations or contracts, except as strictly necessary to wind up the Partnership's affairs.

3. LIQUIDATION OF ASSETS AND SETTLEMENT OF LIABILITIES

The Partners agree to wind up the business and distribute the assets and liabilities as follows:

  • Partnership Assets: The current assets of the Partnership (equipment, inventory, accounts receivable) shall be liquidated or distributed as follows:
    • {{asset_distribution}}
  • Partnership Liabilities: All known debts and liabilities of the Partnership shall be paid or assumed as follows:
    • {{debt_settlement}}
  • Final Accounting: After the settlement of all liabilities, any remaining net assets (or remaining net debts) shall be distributed among the Partners based on the following ratio: {{final_distribution_ratio}}.

4. MUTUAL RELEASE AND DISCHARGE

Upon the complete execution of the terms set forth in Section 3, each Partner hereby fully and forever releases, discharges, and acquits the other Partners from any and all claims, demands, or causes of action arising out of or related to the Partnership, except for the obligations expressly created by this Agreement.

5. POST-DISSOLUTION CONFIDENTIALITY

{{#if (eq confidentiality_continues 'Yes')}}

The Partners agree that any confidential or proprietary information acquired during the Partnership shall remain strictly confidential for a period of {{confidentiality_duration}} following the dissolution.

{{else}}

No specific confidentiality obligations shall survive the dissolution of the Partnership.

{{/if}}

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Partners have read, understood, and executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.

Signatures of Partners:

Partner 1 Name: ......................................................


Signature: _________________________


Partner 2 Name: ......................................................


Signature: _________________________

fields.name: partner_details
fields.label: Details of All Partners
fields.placeholder: List Full Names, Addresses, and Tax IDs of all partners.

fields.name: asset_distribution
fields.label: Distribution / Sale of Assets
fields.placeholder: e.g., Equipment goes to Partner A, remaining cash is split 50/50.

fields.name: debt_settlement
fields.label: Settlement of Liabilities / Debts
fields.placeholder: e.g., All vendor invoices will be paid from the joint bank account.

fields.name: final_distribution_ratio
fields.label: Final Distribution Ratio
fields.placeholder: e.g., 50/50, or according to initial capital contributions
